cursor_task.name: bjt-quiz-study

no_demo_contract.item: Implement a real, minimal vertical slice rather than a static demo.
Use real schema/API/contracts for all persisted workflows.
Do not use fake static arrays or frontend-only state as source of truth.
Include validation, error handling, i18n keys, and tests for critical logic.

cursor_task.objective: Implement BJT quiz/study modules and coaching results.

must_not_do.item: Do not use MongoDB or Mongoose.
Do not hard-code user-facing text outside i18n.
Do not mark unimplemented features as complete.

verification.item: Run relevant format, lint, typecheck, and tests.
Run Prisma generate/migration validation when database changes are made.
Summarize changed files, commands run, completed criteria, and remaining risks.

cursor_task.stop_condition: Stop after this phase and wait for review before starting the next phase.
